name: 人文講堂 (個人品牌的密碼 - 丁菱娟) 4 個短版
notes: "上肢" referred to arms rather than upper body.
"軟" referred to physical weakness/instability rather than tiredness.
"集氣" described a gesture similar to gathering energy rather than literal energy collection.
"火箭踮" may be a specific exercise term and should include a translator note if self-translated.
